#onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-cat-header {
color: #000000;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .banner-option-details {
background-color: #E9E9E9;}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href],
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href] font,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-link-btn
{

}#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler,
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-reject-all-handler {

color: #FFFFFF;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk:focus {

outline-width: 1px;
}

} /***********************************
* TCF BANNER
* APPLY TO EU TEMPLATE
***********************************/
/* Base Selectors - Close Button Container */
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-close-btn-container {
top: 25px;
right: 25px;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .onetrust-close-btn-ui {
width: 12px;
height: 12px;
}
/* Base Selectors - Button Group */
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
text-align: center;
}
/* Base Selectors - Policy Text */
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy-text a.ot-sdk-show-settings {
margin-left: 0;
}
/* Base Selectors - Toggle Label */
#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-tgl .ot-label-status {
display: block!important;
}
/* HTML Overflow Handling */
html:has(>body>div#onetrust-consent-sdk.show-banner) {
overflow-y: hidden;
}
html:has(>body>div#onetrust-consent-sdk.show-banner>div.onetrust-pc-dark-filter[style*="none"]) {
overflow-y: auto;
}
/* Media Queries - Small Screens */
@media only screen and (min-width: 425px) and (max-width: 550px) {
#onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-iab-2 #onetrust-button-group-parent #onetrust-button-group {
width: auto;
}
}
/* Media Queries - Medium Screens */
@media only screen and (min-width: 426px) and (max-width: 896px) {
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .onetrust-close-btn-ui {
top: 0;
right: 0;
}
}
/* Media Queries - Larger Screens */
@media (min-width: 896px) {
#onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-sdk-three.ot-sdk-columns {
left: auto;
right: 4%;
margin-left: 0;
margin-top: 5%;
}
}
@media only screen and (min-width: 769px) {
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
margin-right: 0;
}
}
/* Media Queries - Desktop */
@media only screen and (min-width: 1024px){
#onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-iab-2 #onetrust-button-group-parent {
margin-top: .25em;
}
}
/* hides banner after it has already been interacted with */
#onetrust-consent-sdk:not(.show-banner) #onetrust-banner-sdk {
display: none;
}</style>

<div id="article-content_1-0" class="comp article-content mntl-block"><div id="mntl-sc-page_1-0" class="comp mntl-sc-page mntl-block structured-content" data-sc-sticky-offset="90" data-sc-ad-label-height="24" data-sc-ad-track-spacing="100" data-sc-min-track-height="250" data-sc-max-track-height="600" data-sc-breakpoint="50em" data-sc-load-immediate="4" data-sc-content-positions="[1, 1250, 1550, 1950, 2350, 2750, 3150, 3550, 3950]" data-bind-scroll-on-start="true"><p id="mntl-sc-block_1-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> The biggest night in Hollywood is upon us! 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_2-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_3-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> On Jan. 23, <a href="https://people.com/oscars-2024-nominations-full-list-8547089" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">the full list of Oscar nominations</a> was unveiled, revealing which star-studded movies and actors would be up for awards during the upcoming ceremony. 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_4-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_5-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> <a href="https://people.com/oscars-2024-emily-blunt-scores-first-ever-academy-award-nomination-for-oppenheimer-8547805" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1"><em>Oppenheimer</em></a> led the race with a whopping 13 nominations, followed by the Emma Stone-led <a href="https://people.com/emma-stone-says-poor-things-sex-scenes-are-honest-doesnt-just-like-to-be-naked-8431756" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="2"><em>Poor Things</em></a>, which earned 11, <a href="https://people.com/golden-globes-2024-lily-gladstone-wins-best-actress-drama-motion-picture-killers-of-the-flower-moon-8419791" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="3"><em>Killers of the Flower Moon</em></a> with 10 nominations, and last year's biggest hit<em> <a href="https://people.com/oscars-2024-greta-gerwig-margot-robbie-snubbed-best-director-actress-barbie-8547712" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="4">Barbie</a></em> scoring eight.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_6-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_7-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> The 96th annual Academy Awards will be held this March, featuring some of the biggest and brightest stars in the entertainment industry. (The show will also feature a familiar face as the host.) 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_8-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_9-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> From the biggest nominations to when the ceremony will be held, here’s everything to know about the 2024 Oscars. 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_10-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_11-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-featuredlink mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link--related"><a href="https://people.com/movies/oscars-unforgettable-images-through-the-years/" rel="nocaes" id="mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link__link_1-0" class="mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link__link mntl-text-link text-utility-300 global-link" data-tracking-container="true" data-tracking-id="featured-link"><span class="link__wrapper">31 Utterly Unforgettable Oscars Images, from Envelopegate to Joan Crawford Receiving Her Award in Bed</span></a>
</div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_12-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<span class="heading-toc" id="toc-who-is-nominated-for-the-2024-oscars"></span><h2 id="mntl-sc-block_13-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-heading mntl-sc-block-heading"> <span class="mntl-sc-block-heading__text text-title-300"> Who is nominated for the 2024 Oscars? </span> </h2>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_14-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-landscape figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">

<p id="mntl-sc-block_15-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> The 2024 Oscar nominations included some award-season favorites along with <a href="https://people.com/oscars-2024-biggest-snubs-nominations-leonardo-dicaprio-fantasia-barrino-saltburn-8547894" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">some shocking snubs and surprises</a>. For the Best Picture category, the nominees include <em>American Fiction</em>, <em>Anatomy of a Fall</em>, <em>Barbie</em>, <em>The Holdovers</em>, <em>Killers of the Flower Moon</em>, <em>Maestro</em>, <em>Oppenheimer</em>, <em>Past Lives</em>, <em>Poor Things </em>and <em>The Zone of Interest</em>. 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_16-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_17-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Meanwhile, the Best Actor category includes Bradley Cooper for <em>Maestro</em>, Colman Domingo for <em>Rustin</em>, Paul Giamatti for <em>The Holdovers</em>, Cillian Murphy for <em>Oppenheimer</em> and Jeffrey Wright for <em>American Fiction</em>. 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_18-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_19-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Rounding things out, the Best Actress category includes Annette Bening for<em> Nyad</em>, Lily Gladstone for <em>Killers of the Flower Moon</em>, Sandra Hüller for <em>Anatomy of a Fall</em>, Carey Mulligan for<em> Maestro</em> and Emma Stone for <em>Poor Things</em>. 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_20-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_21-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> The full list of nominees for the 2024 Oscars can be found <a href="https://people.com/oscars-2024-nominations-full-list-8547089" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">here</a>. 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_22-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_23-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-featuredlink mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link--related"><a href="https://people.com/how-to-watch-the-oscars-2024-best-picture-nominees-8547959" rel="nocaes" id="mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link__link_2-0" class="mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link__link mntl-text-link text-utility-300 global-link" data-tracking-container="true" data-tracking-id="featured-link"><span class="link__wrapper">How to Watch the Oscars 2024 Best Picture Nominees, Including Where to Stream</span></a>
</div>

<p id="mntl-sc-block_27-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> The show <a href="https://people.com/jimmy-kimmel-to-host-96th-academy-awards-8402504" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">will be hosted by Jimmy Kimmel</a>, which will mark his fourth time in the gig.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_28-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_29-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-featuredlink mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link--related"><a href="https://people.com/movies/celebrities-who-hosted-the-oscar-the-most/" rel="nocaes" id="mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link__link_3-0" class="mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link__link mntl-text-link text-utility-300 global-link" data-tracking-container="true" data-tracking-id="featured-link"><span class="link__wrapper">See Who Has Hosted the Oscars the Most Times</span></a>
</div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_30-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<span class="heading-toc" id="toc-who-is-performing-at-the-2024-oscars"></span><h2 id="mntl-sc-block_31-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-heading mntl-sc-block-heading"> <span class="mntl-sc-block-heading__text text-title-300"> Who is performing at the 2024 Oscars? </span> </h2>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_32-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-landscape figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">

</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_33-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Ahead of the ceremony, the Academy announced which stars will be taking the stage. Representing the Barbie movie, Ryan Gosling and Mark Ronson will perform "I'm Just Ken," while Billie Eilish and Finneas O’Connell will perform "What Was I Made For?"
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_34-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_35-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Additionally, Jon Batiste will sing "It Never Went Away" from his Netflix documentary <em>American Symphony, </em>Becky G will perform "The Fire Inside" from <em>Flamin’ Hot</em> and Scott George and the Osage Singers will perform "Wahzhazhe (A Song For My People)" from <em>Killers of the Flower Moon</em>.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_36-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<span class="heading-toc" id="toc-who-is-presenting-at-the-2024-oscars"></span><h2 id="mntl-sc-block_37-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-heading mntl-sc-block-heading"> <span class="mntl-sc-block-heading__text text-title-300"> Who is presenting at the 2024 Oscars? </span> </h2>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_38-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-landscape figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">
<div class="img-placeholder" style="padding-bottom:66.6%;">

<figcaption id="mntl-figure-caption_4-0" class="comp mntl-figure-caption text-utility-100 figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-owner">Getty</span>
</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_39-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> The Academy has been rolling out the list of presenters ahead of the ceremony in March. The first round of presenters included Mahershala Ali, Nicolas Cage, Jamie Lee Curtis, Brendan Fraser, Jessica Lange, Matthew McConaughey, Lupita Nyong’o, Al Pacino, Michelle Pfeiffer, Ke Huy Quan, Sam Rockwell, Michelle Yeoh and Zendaya.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_40-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_41-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Shortly after, the Academy announced even more stars slated to take the stage, including Bad Bunny, Chris Hemsworth, Dwayne Johnson, Michael Keaton, Regina King, Jennifer Lawrence, Kate McKinnon, Rita Moreno, John Mulaney, Catherine O’Hara, Octavia Spencer and Ramy Youssef.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_42-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_43-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Additionally, it was announced that five past winners will introduce the current nominees in all four acting categories. The format was hugely popular among viewers and was last done at the Oscars ceremony held 15 years ago.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_44-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<span class="heading-toc" id="toc-when-are-the-2024-oscars"></span><h2 id="mntl-sc-block_45-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-heading mntl-sc-block-heading"> <span class="mntl-sc-block-heading__text text-title-300"> When are the 2024 Oscars? </span> </h2>

gold_text:
From who is nominated to who is hosting, here's everything to know about the 96th annual Academy Awards
The biggest night in Hollywood is upon us! 
On Jan. 23, the full list of Oscar nominations was unveiled, revealing which star-studded movies and actors would be up for awards during the upcoming ceremony. 
Oppenheimer led the race with a whopping 13 nominations, followed by the Emma Stone-led Poor Things, which earned 11, Killers of the Flower Moon with 10 nominations, and last year's biggest hit Barbie scoring eight.

The 96th annual Academy Awards will be held this March, featuring some of the biggest and brightest stars in the entertainment industry. (The show will also feature a familiar face as the host.) 

From the biggest nominations to when the ceremony will be held, here’s everything to know about the 2024 Oscars. 
Who is nominated for the 2024 Oscars?
The 2024 Oscar nominations included some award-season favorites along with some shocking snubs and surprises. For the Best Picture category, the nominees include American Fiction, Anatomy of a Fall, Barbie, The Holdovers, Killers of the Flower Moon, Maestro, Oppenheimer, Past Lives, Poor Things and The Zone of Interest. 
Meanwhile, the Best Actor category includes Bradley Cooper for Maestro, Colman Domingo for Rustin, Paul Giamatti for The Holdovers, Cillian Murphy for Oppenheimer and Jeffrey Wright for American Fiction. 
Rounding things out, the Best Actress category includes Annette Bening for Nyad, Lily Gladstone for Killers of the Flower Moon, Sandra Hüller for Anatomy of a Fall, Carey Mulligan for Maestro and Emma Stone for Poor Things. 
The full list of nominees for the 2024 Oscars can be found here. 
Who is hosting the 2024 Oscars?
The show will be hosted by Jimmy Kimmel, which will mark his fourth time in the gig.
Who is performing at the 2024 Oscars?
Ahead of the ceremony, the Academy announced which stars will be taking the stage. Representing the Barbie movie, Ryan Gosling and Mark Ronson will perform "I'm Just Ken," while Billie Eilish and Finneas O’Connell will perform "What Was I Made For?"

Additionally, Jon Batiste will sing "It Never Went Away" from his Netflix documentary American Symphony, Becky G will perform "The Fire Inside" from Flamin’ Hot and Scott George and the Osage Singers will perform "Wahzhazhe (A Song For My People)" from Killers of the Flower Moon.
Who is presenting at the 2024 Oscars?
The Academy has been rolling out the list of presenters ahead of the ceremony in March. The first round of presenters included Mahershala Ali, Nicolas Cage, Jamie Lee Curtis, Brendan Fraser, Jessica Lange, Matthew McConaughey, Lupita Nyong’o, Al Pacino, Michelle Pfeiffer, Ke Huy Quan, Sam Rockwell, Michelle Yeoh and Zendaya.

Shortly after, the Academy announced even more stars slated to take the stage, including Bad Bunny, Chris Hemsworth, Dwayne Johnson, Michael Keaton, Regina King, Jennifer Lawrence, Kate McKinnon, Rita Moreno, John Mulaney, Catherine O’Hara, Octavia Spencer and Ramy Youssef.

Additionally, it was announced that five past winners will introduce the current nominees in all four acting categories. The format was hugely popular among viewers and was last done at the Oscars ceremony held 15 years ago.
When are the 2024 Oscars?
The 96th annual Academy Awards will be held Sunday, March 10, at the Dolby Theatre at Ovation Hollywood and will air live on ABC starting at 7:00 p.m. ET (an hour earlier than usual).

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-policy-title,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-policy-text,
#onetrust-consent-sdk .ot-b-addl-desc,

#onetrust-consent-sdk .ot-dpd-desc *:not(.onetrust-vendors-list-handler),
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk #banner-options *,
#onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-cat-header {
color: #000000;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .banner-option-details {
background-color: #E9E9E9;}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href],
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href] font,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-link-btn
{
color: #000000;
}#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler,
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-reject-all-handler {
background-color: #000000;border-color: #000000;
color: #FFFFFF;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk *:focus,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk:focus {
outline-color: #000000;
outline-width: 1px;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler,

} /***********************************
* TCF BANNER
* APPLY TO EU TEMPLATE
***********************************/
/* Base Selectors - Close Button Container */
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-close-btn-container {
top: 25px;
right: 25px;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .onetrust-close-btn-ui {
width: 12px;
height: 12px;
}
/* Base Selectors - Button Group */
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
text-align: center;
}
/* Base Selectors - Policy Text */
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy-text a.ot-sdk-show-settings {
margin-left: 0;
}
/* Base Selectors - Toggle Label */
#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-tgl .ot-label-status {
display: block!important;
}
/* HTML Overflow Handling */
html:has(>body>div#onetrust-consent-sdk.show-banner) {
overflow-y: hidden;
}
html:has(>body>div#onetrust-consent-sdk.show-banner>div.onetrust-pc-dark-filter[style*="none"]) {
overflow-y: auto;
}
/* Media Queries - Small Screens */
@media only screen and (min-width: 425px) and (max-width: 550px) {
#onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-iab-2 #onetrust-button-group-parent #onetrust-button-group {
width: auto;
}
}
/* Media Queries - Medium Screens */
@media only screen and (min-width: 426px) and (max-width: 896px) {
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .onetrust-close-btn-ui {
top: 0;
right: 0;
}
}
/* Media Queries - Larger Screens */
@media (min-width: 896px) {
#onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-sdk-three.ot-sdk-columns {
left: auto;
right: 4%;
margin-left: 0;
margin-top: 5%;
}
}
@media only screen and (min-width: 769px) {
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
margin-right: 0;
}
}
/* Media Queries - Desktop */
@media only screen and (min-width: 1024px){
#onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-iab-2 #onetrust-button-group-parent {
margin-top: .25em;
}
}
/* hides banner after it has already been interacted with */
#onetrust-consent-sdk:not(.show-banner) #onetrust-banner-sdk {
display: none;
}</style>

<h1 class="article-heading text-headline-400">Hilarie Burton Searches for Justice in Season 3 of <em>True Crime Story: It Couldn’t Happen Here</em> (Exclusive)</h1>

<div id="article-content_1-0" class="comp article-content mntl-block"><div id="mntl-sc-page_1-0" class="comp mntl-sc-page mntl-block structured-content" data-sc-sticky-offset="90" data-sc-ad-label-height="24" data-sc-ad-track-spacing="100" data-sc-min-track-height="250" data-sc-max-track-height="600" data-sc-breakpoint="50em" data-sc-load-immediate="4" data-sc-content-positions="[1, 1250, 1550, 1950, 2350, 2750, 3150, 3550, 3950]" data-bind-scroll-on-start="true"><div id="mntl-sc-block_1-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-callout mntl-sc-block-universal-callout theme-needtoknow" data-tracking-id="mntl-sc-block-callout" data-tracking-container="true"> <h3 class="mntl-sc-block-universal-callout__heading">NEED TO KNOW</h3>
<div class="mntl-sc-block-universal-callout__body"><ul><li>Hilarie Burton is back for a third season of <em>True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here</em></li><li>Burton tells PEOPLE about the cases the show has helped and the lesson it taught her about prioritizing family</li><li><em>True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here</em> premieres on February 19 at 10 p.m. ET on SundanceTV and streaming across AMC+ and All Reality</li></ul></div>
</div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_2-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> <a href="https://people.com/tag/hilarie-burton/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">Hilarie Burton</a> is continuing her mission to help families and communities heal one story at a time. <br><br>
When <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sOzTIPGKoZQ" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="2" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><em>True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here</em></a> returns on February 19 on SundanceTV, the six-episode third season will take Burton across Pennsylvania, Texas, Indiana, Oklahoma and Kentucky as she seeks justice for cases that include missing daughters, unsolved murders and suspicious deaths.<br><br>
“Of all the jobs I do, this is the one I feel the most responsibility for and care about the most,” Burton exclusively tells PEOPLE about her work on the AMC Networks’ series since 2020.<br><br>
The <a href="https://people.com/one-tree-hill-cast-where-are-they-now-11814786" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="3"><em>One Tree Hill</em> </a>star, 43, drives to many of the destinations to speak with family members of those involved in cases, as well as community members and legal experts, to seek accountability and uncover systemic flaws in the criminal justice system. 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_3-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_4-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-landscape figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">
<div class="img-placeholder" style="padding-bottom:66.6%;">
<img data-src="https://people.com/thmb/5RpFe_mlMAhHdWCuVRCN-HFXnUA=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(902x207:904x209):format(webp)/hilarie-burton-amc-2-021826-d6fdb688c1894f4380c57814d8d5ff54.jpg" width="1500" height="1000" data-srcset="https://people.com/thmb/5RpFe_mlMAhHdWCuVRCN-HFXnUA=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(902x207:904x209):format(webp)/hilarie-burton-amc-2-021826-d6fdb688c1894f4380c57814d8d5ff54.jpg 4000w" data-sizes="4000px" alt="Hilarie Burton Morgan in Season 3 of 'It Couldn't Happen Here'." class=" mntl-image mntl-image universal-image__image lazyloadwait" data-expand="300" id="mntl-sc-block-image_1-0" data-click-tracked="true" data-img-lightbox-variant="" data-tracking-container="true" data-img-lightbox="true">

<figcaption id="mntl-figure-caption_1-0" class="comp mntl-figure-caption text-utility-100 figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-text">Hilarie Burton is seen on season 3 of 'True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here.'.</span>
<span class="figure-article-caption-owner"><p>AMC Networks</p></span>
</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_5-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> For Burton, who has been drawn to true-crime media since she was in school, it's important that she take great care with the stories she covers. <br><br>
“I saw how people I knew were portrayed in the media. I saw how their stories were boiled down to very elementary, very primary fun facts. That was very hurtful to me, and it was hurtful to the people that I love,” she says, adding, “With our show, I did not want to tell these stories for entertainment's sake. I didn't want to be a vulture.”<br><br>
Out of all the cases this season, there's one Burton can’t shake when PEOPLE speaks with her in January. <br><br>
“The case that's top of mind right now, because they all weigh on me in different ways, is the Subramanyam case because it's so timely,” says Burton.<br><br>
Featured on the season’s second episode, Subramanyam "Subu" Vedam was <a href="https://people.com/man-wrongfully-imprisoned-for-43-years-detained-by-ice-immediately-after-being-release-from-jail-11833057" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">released from prison in October</a> after spending 43 years in prison for a murder he didn't commit. On the day of his release, Vedam, 64, was detained by Immigration and Customs Enforcement officers under the threat of being deported to India, where he hasn't lived since he was 9 months old.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_6-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_7-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-landscape figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">

<figcaption id="mntl-figure-caption_2-0" class="comp mntl-figure-caption text-utility-100 figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-text">Subramanyam "Subu" Vedam's case is featured on season 3, episode 2 of 'It Couldn't Happen Here.'.</span>
<span class="figure-article-caption-owner"><p>Abby Drey/Centre Daily Times/Tribune News Service via Getty</p></span>
</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_8-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “It is such a grave injustice what's happening to him right now,” says Burton of Vedam’s case. “We're in this really delicate phase where we want to be respectful of the people who have Subu's fate in their hands right now, but we also want to be very firm.” <br><br>
“I'm very torn up about it, and I really have a great deal of affection for his family,” Burton adds. “His family meant a lot to me this year.”<br><br>
In addition to the current season, <a href="https://people.com/hilarie-burton-return-to-the-walking-dead-universe-after-family-loss-11758635" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1"><em>The Walking Dead</em></a><em> </em>star says she’s constantly receiving updates on previous cases, including <a href="https://deathpenaltyinfo.org/possible-innocence-case-highlights-concerns-about-ohios-death-penalty" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="2" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Tyrone Noling</a>, a man on death row in Ohio from season one. <br><br>
“I just recently had to write a letter to the governor asking [him] to pardon Tyrone because, against a mountain of evidence that he did not do this crime, the prosecutor is not only still fighting for the conviction and saying, ‘No, this guy absolutely did it,' but is trying to expedite the death sentence. It's so dark.”<br><br>
Burton says the show’s advocacy also helped Jason Lively, whose case was also featured on season one, get a <a href="https://www.wvlegislature.gov/Bill_Status/bills_text.cfm?billdoc=sb628%20sub1.htm&yr=2024&sesstype=RS&i=628" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="3" target="_blank" rel="noopener">$1.56 million payout </a><a href="https://exonerationregistry.org/cases/12898" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="4" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank">approved</a> from the state of West Virginia for wrongfully imprisoning him for nearly 15 years for a murder he didn't commit.
</p>

<p id="mntl-sc-block_13-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “The calls to action that we do for each episode are really important,” says Burton of the real-life impact viewers have after an episode airs. “For anybody who's unsure if their involvement in our show matters, I'm here to tell you, my inbox is insane right now with the traction that we are finding on our cases.”<br><br>
"We don't stop caring about the story just because it aired. We're still involved,” she continues. “Until the family feels like they have justice, our job isn't done."<br><br>
Covering so many heavy cases can take a toll (earlier seasons comprised of 14 and 6 episodes, respectively), but Burton credits her husband, <a href="https://people.com/tag/jeffrey-dean-morgan/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">Jeffrey Dean Morgan</a>, with being her rock. <br><br>
“He catches all the tears,” says Burton of <a href="https://people.com/all-about-hilarie-burton-jeffrey-dean-morgan-kids-8572334" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="2"><em>The Walking Dead: Dead City</em></a><em> </em>star, 59, who receives a thank you at the end of every episode. “On the drives home, my husband is the person who catches me, and just kind of has to absorb what I've taken on over the last couple of days.”
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_14-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>

<figcaption id="mntl-figure-caption_4-0" class="comp mntl-figure-caption text-utility-100 figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-text">Hilarie Burton and Jeffrey Dean Morgan in April 2025.</span>
<span class="figure-article-caption-owner"><p>Arnold Jerocki/WireImage</p></span>
</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_18-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Between his own busy schedule of filming AMC’s zombie spinoff and hosting NBC’s reality show <a href="https://people.com/jeffrey-dean-morgan-says-wife-hilarie-burton-convinced-him-to-host-destination-x-exclusive-11742556" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1"><em>Destination X</em></a><em> </em>last year, Burton says Morgan, whom she’s been with <a href="https://people.com/tv/jeffrey-dean-morgan-hilarie-burton-relationship-timeline/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="2">since 2009</a> and <a href="https://people.com/tv/hilarie-burton-jeffrey-dean-morgan-secretly-got-married/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="3">married a decade</a> later, made time to come to shoots for her series, which filmed its current season from mid-2024 into 2025.<br><br>
“[He] really articulated how much he cares about this work and how proud he is,” Burton says. “My crew also loves my husband, which makes everything so much easier.”
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_19-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_20-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> <strong>Never miss a story — sign up for PEOPLE's </strong><a href="https://people.com/people-news-daily-newsletter-sign-up-8692701" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1"><strong>free daily newsletter</strong></a><strong> to stay up-to-date on the best of what PEOPLE has to offer​​, from celebrity news to compelling human interest stories.</strong><br><br>
When asked how she unwinds after filming, Burton says it can be easy to "double down" on the work, which she feels such a responsibility toward. However, there is one lesson she has taken away from meeting with so many families. <br><br>
“Working on this show has made me realize how temporary everything is and how I really need to focus on what's wonderful in my life while fighting for the things that are problematic,” says Burton. <br><br>
That includes making time for her and Morgan’s <a href="https://people.com/all-about-hilarie-burton-jeffrey-dean-morgan-kids-8572334" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="2">two children</a>, Augustus “Gus,” 15, and George Virginia, 8. Since the Morgans relocated their primary home to New York City last fall (they still make regular visits to their 100-acre farm in Rhinebeck, NY), the family recently celebrated George’s birthday <a href="https://people.com/hilarie-burton-jeffrey-dean-morgan-valentines-day-2026-plans-11904543" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="3">with a Broadway show</a> over Valentine’s weekend. <br>
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_21-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_22-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-portrait figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">
<div class="img-placeholder" style="padding-bottom:150.0%;">

<figcaption id="mntl-figure-caption_5-0" class="comp mntl-figure-caption text-utility-100 figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-text">Jeffrey Dean Morgan (left) with daughter George, son Gus and wife Hilarie Burton in April 2025.</span>
<span class="figure-article-caption-owner"><p>Arnold Jerocki/WireImage</p></span>
</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_23-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> A few weeks earlier, the Morgans attended the final Sundance Film Festival in Park City, Utah, before its move to Boulder, Colo., next year.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_24-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_25-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> "If I'm being intentional about this work and about this process and what we're putting out there into the world, I have to be equally as intentional about creating joy with my kids, with my husband, with my friends,” says Burton of maintaining a healthy work-life balance. 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_26-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_27-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> And while Burton is proud of the difference <em>True Crime Story: It Couldn’t Happen Here</em><strong> </strong>is making in people’s lives, there's an air of melancholy that comes with the work.<br><br>“It makes me sad, honestly, that it took a teen drama actress to help,” Burton says, reflecting on the show’s three seasons. “There are a lot of people in the world who are smarter than me and more talented and have bigger platforms. And so I just really want to encourage anyone who has a shred of interest in helping people in this capacity: Just do it. Just pick one case. If you can make a difference in one case, you're changing a whole community's world.”<br><br>She adds: “I think we're all capable of much more than we give ourselves credit for.”
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_28-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_29-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> <em>True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here</em> premieres Feb. 19 at 10 p.m. ET on SundanceTV and streaming across AMC+ and All Reality.<br>
</p></div></div>

<div id="recirc-lead__details_1-0" class="comp recirc-lead__details mntl-block"><a href="https://people.com/entertainment/" rel="nocaes" class="recirc-lead__taxonomy mntl-text-link " id="recirc-lead__taxonomy_1-0" data-tracking-container="true"><span class="link__wrapper">Entertainment</span></a>

clearTimeout(inactivityTimer);

embed() {
function overwriteIframeTitle(mutationList, embedTitle, observer) {
for (const mutation of mutationList) {
if (mutation.type === 'childList') {
const parentNode = mutationList[0].target;
// Grab iframe from parentNode
const iframe = parentNode.querySelector('iframe');
if (iframe !== null) {
// Overwrite iframe title attr with title from Selene
iframe.title = embedTitle;
observer.disconnect();
// Early return, prevent further looping for other mutations
return;
}
}
}
}
function observeChildNodeChanges(embed) {
const config = {
childList: true,
subtree: true
};
/* Explicitly use arrow function for the callback executed on
observed node to pass in embed title to overwrite iframe title */
const observer = new MutationObserver((mutationList) => {
overwriteIframeTitle(mutationList, embed.dataset.title, observer);
});
observer.observe(embed, config);
}
function observerCallback(entries, observer) {
entries.forEach((entry) => {
if (entry.isIntersecting) {
const digiohEmbed = entry.target;
if (Mntl.digioh.initialized) {
observer.unobserve(digiohEmbed);
} else {
Mntl.digioh.types.load(() => observer.unobserve(digiohEmbed));
}
}
});
}
const digiohEmbeds = document.querySelectorAll('.mntl-sc-block-digiohembed__container');
const options = { rootMargin: '300px' };
const observer = new IntersectionObserver(observerCallback, options);
digiohEmbeds.forEach((embed) => {
observer.observe(embed);
observeChildNodeChanges(embed);
});
}
}
};
if (Mntl.digioh.type) Mntl.digioh.types[Mntl.digioh.type]();

gold_text:
Burton talks to PEOPLE about the season 3 return of her SundanceTV show and how it made her realize 'how temporary everything is' in life.

Hilarie Burton is continuing her mission to help families and communities heal one story at a time. 

When True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here returns on February 19 on SundanceTV, the six-episode third season will take Burton across Pennsylvania, Texas, Indiana, Oklahoma and Kentucky as she seeks justice for cases that include missing daughters, unsolved murders and suspicious deaths.

“Of all the jobs I do, this is the one I feel the most responsibility for and care about the most,” Burton exclusively tells PEOPLE about her work on the AMC Networks’ series since 2020.

The One Tree Hill star, 43, drives to many of the destinations to speak with family members of those involved in cases, as well as community members and legal experts, to seek accountability and uncover systemic flaws in the criminal justice system. 
For Burton, who has been drawn to true-crime media since she was in school, it's important that she take great care with the stories she covers. 

“I saw how people I knew were portrayed in the media. I saw how their stories were boiled down to very elementary, very primary fun facts. That was very hurtful to me, and it was hurtful to the people that I love,” she says, adding, “With our show, I did not want to tell these stories for entertainment's sake. I didn't want to be a vulture.”

Out of all the cases this season, there's one Burton can’t shake when PEOPLE speaks with her in January. 

“The case that's top of mind right now, because they all weigh on me in different ways, is the Subramanyam case because it's so timely,” says Burton.

Featured on the season’s second episode, Subramanyam "Subu" Vedam was released from prison in October after spending 43 years in prison for a murder he didn't commit. On the day of his release, Vedam, 64, was detained by Immigration and Customs Enforcement officers under the threat of being deported to India, where he hasn't lived since he was 9 months old.
“It is such a grave injustice what's happening to him right now,” says Burton of Vedam’s case. “We're in this really delicate phase where we want to be respectful of the people who have Subu's fate in their hands right now, but we also want to be very firm.” 

“I'm very torn up about it, and I really have a great deal of affection for his family,” Burton adds. “His family meant a lot to me this year.”

In addition to the current season, The Walking Dead star says she’s constantly receiving updates on previous cases, including Tyrone Noling, a man on death row in Ohio from season one. 

“I just recently had to write a letter to the governor asking [him] to pardon Tyrone because, against a mountain of evidence that he did not do this crime, the prosecutor is not only still fighting for the conviction and saying, ‘No, this guy absolutely did it,' but is trying to expedite the death sentence. It's so dark.”

Burton says the show’s advocacy also helped Jason Lively, whose case was also featured on season one, get a $1.56 million payout approved from the state of West Virginia for wrongfully imprisoning him for nearly 15 years for a murder he didn't commit.
“The calls to action that we do for each episode are really important,” says Burton of the real-life impact viewers have after an episode airs. “For anybody who's unsure if their involvement in our show matters, I'm here to tell you, my inbox is insane right now with the traction that we are finding on our cases.”

"We don't stop caring about the story just because it aired. We're still involved,” she continues. “Until the family feels like they have justice, our job isn't done."

Covering so many heavy cases can take a toll (earlier seasons comprised of 14 and 6 episodes, respectively), but Burton credits her husband, Jeffrey Dean Morgan, with being her rock. 

“He catches all the tears,” says Burton of The Walking Dead: Dead City star, 59, who receives a thank you at the end of every episode. “On the drives home, my husband is the person who catches me, and just kind of has to absorb what I've taken on over the last couple of days.”
Between his own busy schedule of filming AMC’s zombie spinoff and hosting NBC’s reality show Destination X last year, Burton says Morgan, whom she’s been with since 2009 and married a decade later, made time to come to shoots for her series, which filmed its current season from mid-2024 into 2025.

“[He] really articulated how much he cares about this work and how proud he is,” Burton says. “My crew also loves my husband, which makes everything so much easier.”
 When asked how she unwinds after filming, Burton says it can be easy to "double down" on the work, which she feels such a responsibility toward. However, there is one lesson she has taken away from meeting with so many families. 

“Working on this show has made me realize how temporary everything is and how I really need to focus on what's wonderful in my life while fighting for the things that are problematic,” says Burton. 

That includes making time for her and Morgan’s two children, Augustus “Gus,” 15, and George Virginia, 8. Since the Morgans relocated their primary home to New York City last fall (they still make regular visits to their 100-acre farm in Rhinebeck, NY), the family recently celebrated George’s birthday with a Broadway show over Valentine’s weekend. 

A few weeks earlier, the Morgans attended the final Sundance Film Festival in Park City, Utah, before its move to Boulder, Colo., next year.

"If I'm being intentional about this work and about this process and what we're putting out there into the world, I have to be equally as intentional about creating joy with my kids, with my husband, with my friends,” says Burton of maintaining a healthy work-life balance. 

And while Burton is proud of the difference True Crime Story: It Couldn’t Happen Here is making in people’s lives, there's an air of melancholy that comes with the work.

“It makes me sad, honestly, that it took a teen drama actress to help,” Burton says, reflecting on the show’s three seasons. “There are a lot of people in the world who are smarter than me and more talented and have bigger platforms. And so I just really want to encourage anyone who has a shred of interest in helping people in this capacity: Just do it. Just pick one case. If you can make a difference in one case, you're changing a whole community's world.”

She adds: “I think we're all capable of much more than we give ourselves credit for.”

True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here premieres Feb. 19 at 10 p.m. ET on SundanceTV and streaming across AMC+ and All Reality.

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-policy-text,
#onetrust-consent-sdk .ot-b-addl-desc,
#onetrust-consent-sdk .ot-dpd-desc,

#onetrust-consent-sdk .ot-dpd-desc *:not(.onetrust-vendors-list-handler),
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk #banner-options *,
#onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-cat-header {
color: #000000;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .banner-option-details {
background-color: #E9E9E9;}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href],
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href] font,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-link-btn
{
color: #000000;
}#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler,
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-reject-all-handler {
background-color: #000000;border-color: #000000;
color: #FFFFFF;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk *:focus,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk:focus {
outline-color: #000000;
outline-width: 1px;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler.cookie-setting-link {
color: #000000; border-color: #000000;
background-color:

} /***********************************
* TCF BANNER
* APPLY TO EU TEMPLATE
***********************************/
/* Base Selectors - Close Button Container */
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-close-btn-container {
top: 25px;
right: 25px;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .onetrust-close-btn-ui {
width: 12px;
height: 12px;
}
/* Base Selectors - Button Group */
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
text-align: center;
}
/* Base Selectors - Policy Text */
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy-text a.ot-sdk-show-settings {
margin-left: 0;
}
/* Base Selectors - Toggle Label */
#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-tgl .ot-label-status {
display: block!important;
}
/* HTML Overflow Handling */
html:has(>body>div#onetrust-consent-sdk.show-banner) {
overflow-y: hidden;
}
html:has(>body>div#onetrust-consent-sdk.show-banner>div.onetrust-pc-dark-filter[style*="none"]) {
overflow-y: auto;
}
/* Media Queries - Small Screens */
@media only screen and (min-width: 425px) and (max-width: 550px) {
#onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-iab-2 #onetrust-button-group-parent #onetrust-button-group {
width: auto;
}
}
/* Media Queries - Medium Screens */
@media only screen and (min-width: 426px) and (max-width: 896px) {
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .onetrust-close-btn-ui {
top: 0;
right: 0;
}
}
/* Media Queries - Larger Screens */
@media (min-width: 896px) {
#onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-sdk-three.ot-sdk-columns {
left: auto;
right: 4%;
margin-left: 0;
margin-top: 5%;
}
}
@media only screen and (min-width: 769px) {
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
margin-right: 0;
}
}
/* Media Queries - Desktop */
@media only screen and (min-width: 1024px){
#onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-iab-2 #onetrust-button-group-parent {
margin-top: .25em;
}
}
/* hides banner after it has already been interacted with */
#onetrust-consent-sdk:not(.show-banner) #onetrust-banner-sdk {
display: none;
}</style>

<div id="article-content_1-0" class="comp article-content mntl-block"><div id="mntl-sc-page_1-0" class="comp mntl-sc-page mntl-block structured-content" data-sc-sticky-offset="90" data-sc-ad-label-height="24" data-sc-ad-track-spacing="100" data-sc-min-track-height="250" data-sc-max-track-height="600" data-sc-breakpoint="50em" data-sc-load-immediate="4" data-sc-content-positions="[1, 1250, 1550, 1950, 2350, 2750, 3150, 3550, 3950]" data-bind-scroll-on-start="true"><p id="mntl-sc-block_1-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> On the heels of <a href="https://people.com/person/king-charles-iii/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">King Charles</a>’ royal tour of Australia and Samoa alongside wife <a href="https://people.com/person/queen-camilla/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="2">Queen Camilla</a>, a palace official said the public should expect more visits abroad from the couple.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_2-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_3-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> The King, 75, and the Queen, 77, left Samoa on Saturday, Oct. 26, just over a week after landing in Australia on Friday, Oct. 18. As Charles continues to receive treatment for cancer — which he is expected to resume upon his return to the U.K. after reportedly <a href="https://people.com/king-charles-will-pause-cancer-treatment-during-royal-tour-of-australia-and-samoa-8724199" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">pausing it for the tour</a> — multiple outlets reported that he will resume regular overseas trips in 2025 after a hiatus to prioritize his health following <a href="https://people.com/king-charles-cancer-diagnosis-and-treatment-timeline-8559024" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="2">his diagnosis earlier this year</a>.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_4-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_5-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Royal visits will resume in the spring, according to <a href="https://www.theguardian.com/uk-news/2024/oct/26/king-charles-to-resume-regular-overseas-trips-in-2025-after-cancer-hiatus" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><em>The Guardian</em></a>, with all trips subject to doctors’ approval. The outlet reported that the King will fly abroad during both the spring and the fall, the traditional periods for official overseas royal visits.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_6-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_7-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-featuredlink mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link--related"><a href="https://people.com/king-charles-queen-camilla-australia-samoa-royal-tour-in-photos-8730476" rel="nocaes" id="mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link__link_1-0" class="mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link__link mntl-text-link text-utility-300 global-link" data-tracking-container="true" data-tracking-id="featured-link"><span class="link__wrapper">King Charles and Queen Camilla Conclude Royal Tour of Australia and Samoa: See the Best Photos!</span></a>
</div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_8-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_9-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-landscape figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">
<div class="img-placeholder" style="padding-bottom:66.6%;">

<span class="figure-article-caption-owner"><p>Dean Lewins - Pool/Getty</p></span>
</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_10-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “We’re now working on a pretty normal-looking, full overseas tour program for next year,” a senior palace official said. “Which is a high for us to end on, to know that we can be thinking in those terms, subject to signoff by doctors.”
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_11-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_12-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> The King began outpatient treatment for an undisclosed type and stage of cancer in early February. He initially stopped all public-facing duties — though he continued to work behind the scenes — and resumed front-facing royal work on April 30. This recent tour to Australia and Samoa was his first long-distance visit since his diagnosis, which came following a routine procedure for a benign enlarged prostate. (The palace clarified that the King does not have prostate cancer.)
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_13-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_14-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> The King’s tour to Australia and Samoa originally also included a third leg to New Zealand, but those plans were scrapped on the advice of his doctors. Though the couple’s schedule was plenty busy — sometimes including up to 10 engagements between them in a single day — there was a rest day factored in after the King and Queen’s long flight into Sydney on Saturday, Oct. 19, and they only took part in one evening event.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_15-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_16-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-landscape figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">
<div class="img-placeholder" style="padding-bottom:66.6%;">
<img data-src="https://people.com/thmb/weV0iAOYYXHgWMVdHbNicuH5t7k=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(742x224:744x226):format(webp)/King-Charles-Queen-Camilla-Australia-Tour-102124-tout-2844829241114d3b968eb30423f46f75.jpg" width="1500" height="1000" data-srcset="https://people.com/thmb/weV0iAOYYXHgWMVdHbNicuH5t7k=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(742x224:744x226):format(webp)/King-Charles-Queen-Camilla-Australia-Tour-102124-tout-2844829241114d3b968eb30423f46f75.jpg 4000w" data-sizes="4000px" alt="Queen Camilla and King Charles III visit the Australian National Botanic Gardens on October 21, 2024 in Canberra, Australia. <figcaption id="mntl-figure-caption_2-0" class="comp mntl-figure-caption text-utility-100 figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-text">Queen Camilla and King Charles visit the Australian National Botanic Gardens on Oct. 21, 2024 in Canberra, Australia.</span>

</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_17-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “I think it’s great testament to the King’s devotion to service and duty that he was prepared to come this far and he was incredibly happy and very, very determined to do so,” the palace official continued, adding that Charles “genuinely loved” the tour and “genuinely thrived” on the schedule of engagements planned. The tour lifted “his spirits, his mood and his recovery,” the official said.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_18-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_19-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “In that sense, the tour, despite its demands, has been the perfect tonic,” the official added.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_20-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_21-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Charles reportedly had <a href="https://people.com/two-doctors-will-join-king-charles-on-royal-tour-of-australia-and-samoa-8727233" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">two doctors traveling with him</a> on the trip — including his personal doctor, <a href="https://www.telegraph.co.uk/royal-family/2024/10/26/king-ready-to-resume-full-royal-tour-schedule-after-success/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="2" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><em>The Telegraph</em></a> reported — and his medical team ensured his “body is properly looked after,” a senior palace official said, according to the outlet. It resulted in a “very successful visit in these circumstances,” the official added.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_22-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_23-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-landscape figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">
<div class="img-placeholder" style="padding-bottom:66.6%;">
<img data-src="https://people.com/thmb/Mvbwpd8PbN-R-T0lkmH88rbS7Ks=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(776x131:778x133):format(webp)/king-charles-queen-camilla-samoa-102424-5536-0a51193e562a4e14868da1100baff345.jpg" width="1500" height="1000" data-srcset="https://people.com/thmb/Mvbwpd8PbN-R-T0lkmH88rbS7Ks=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(776x131:778x133):format(webp)/king-charles-queen-camilla-samoa-102424-5536-0a51193e562a4e14868da1100baff345.jpg 4000w" data-sizes="4000px" alt="king charles queen camilla samoa 10 24 24 " class=" mntl-image mntl-image universal-image__image lazyloadwait" data-expand="300" id="mntl-sc-block-image_3-0" data-click-tracked="true" data-img-lightbox-variant="" data-tracking-container="true" data-img-lightbox="true">

<figcaption id="mntl-figure-caption_3-0" class="comp mntl-figure-caption text-utility-100 figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-text">King Charles and Queen Camilla during a Samoa Cultural Village visit on Oct. 24, 2024 in Apia, Samoa.</span>
<span class="figure-article-caption-owner"><p>Chris Jackson/Getty</p></span>
</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_24-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> The nine-day visit included some protests, particularly in Australia, when Charles was heckled on Monday, Oct. 21 by Indigenous lawmaker Lidia Thorpe at Parliament House in Canberra. 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_25-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_26-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “He was completely unruffled,” according to a royal official, per the <a href="https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2450lw731o" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" target="_blank" rel="noopener">BBC</a>. “He’s been around a long time. As always, [he] kept calm, carried on. He believes free speech is the cornerstone of democracy, and so everyone is entitled to their views.”
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_27-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_28-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-featuredlink mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link--related"><a href="https://people.com/australian-lawmaker-shouts-youre-not-my-king-at-king-charles-parliament-8731210" rel="nocaes" id="mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link__link_2-0" class="mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link__link mntl-text-link text-utility-300 global-link" data-tracking-container="true" data-tracking-id="featured-link"><span class="link__wrapper">‘You Are Not Our King,’ Australian Lawmaker Shouts at King Charles in Shocking Moment During Royal Tour</span></a>
</div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_29-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_30-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> He also faced calls to <a href="https://people.com/king-charles-says-painful-aspects-of-our-past-continue-as-calls-for-slavery-reparations-intensify-8734148" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">address slavery reparations</a> and continues to face the persistent question of whether <a href="https://people.com/king-charles-believes-australia-keeping-him-head-of-state-is-a-matter-for-australian-public-to-decide-8727832" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="2">Australia will become a republic</a>, leaving him behind as head of state. (Australia is one of 14 countries around the world where Charles is monarch; Barbados was the last country to become a republic, doing so three years ago in 2021.)
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_31-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_32-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> <a href="https://www.thetimes.com/uk/royal-family/article/king-charles-overseas-trip-cancer-queen-camilla-x6bmsjbsk" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank"><em>The Times</em></a> quoted a source as saying that the King will not “duck” out of addressing difficult issues: “He is always someone who wants to understand before he says anything,” the source said. “He’s a listener more than he’s a talker. It’s very easy to run away from some of these issues, but the King isn’t one for doing that.”
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_33-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_34-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-landscape figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">
<div class="img-placeholder" style="padding-bottom:66.6%;">

</noscript>
</div> </div>
<figcaption id="mntl-figure-caption_4-0" class="comp mntl-figure-caption text-utility-100 figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-text">King Charles attends a reception to celebrate the bicentenary of the Legislative Council on Oct. 20, 2024 in Sydney Australia.</span>
<span class="figure-article-caption-owner"><p>David GRAY - Pool/Getty </p></span>
</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_35-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> A palace official added that Camilla is a source of encouragement for Charles, telling the BBC, “The King gets great strength from the Queen being there, not least when she keeps it real.”
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_36-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_37-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Though it’s not yet clear where the King (and presumably the Queen) is headed in 2025, during his final engagement in Samoa, Charles was unexpectedly handed a microphone during a ceremony in the village of Siumu. According to <em>The Times</em>, after thanking Samoa for such a warm welcome, he said, “I shall always remain devoted to this part of the world and hope that I survive long enough to come back again and see you.”
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_38-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_39-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> At the end of the tour, Charles and Camilla shared a message on social media marking the end of the historic tour. “As our visits to Australia and Samoa come to a close, my wife and I would like to thank both nations for the warmest of welcomes and for the countless fond memories we will carry in our hearts for many years to come,” the message read.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_40-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_41-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-embed mntl-sc-block-universal-embed mntl-sc-block-embed--instagram"><iframe id="mntl-sc-block_41-0-iframe" class="mntl-sc-block-universal-embed--iframe-legacy lazyloadwait" allowfullscreen="false" frameborder="0" sandbox="allow-forms allow-popups allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation" title="The Royal Family" data-expand="300" data-src="/embed?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fp%2FDBmgZxuTgRN%2F%3Fhl%3Den&id=mntl-sc-block_41-0-iframe&options=e30%3D&docId=8735207"></iframe></div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_42-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_43-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “Even when we are far apart in distance, the many close connections that unite us across the globe and through our Commonwealth family have been renewed, and will remain as profound as they are enduring,” the message continued.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_44-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_45-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> <em>The Times</em> reported that Charles will take a short rest period before resuming a full schedule of engagements as the holidays approach — and then 2025 and the hopeful normalcy it will bring.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_46-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_47-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “The idea of these tours always is to leave a trace behind,” a palace aide said, per <em>The Times</em>.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_48-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_49-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-square figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">
<div class="img-placeholder" style="padding-bottom:100.0%;">

<p id="mntl-sc-block_50-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> <strong>Can't get enough of PEOPLE's Royals coverage?<a href="https://forms.dotdashmeredith.com/people-royals" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank"> Sign up for our free Royals newsletter</a> to get the latest updates on Kate Middleton, Meghan Markle and more!</strong>
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_51-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_52-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> The King’s daughter-in-law <a href="https://people.com/tag/kate-middleton/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">Kate Middleton</a> was also diagnosed with cancer earlier this year, following a <a href="https://people.com/kate-middleton-abdominal-surgery-cancer-treatment-timeline-8432059" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="2">“planned abdominal surgery”</a> in January. Her diagnosis was announced in March, and she made two official public appearances over the summer — at Trooping the Colour in June and Wimbledon in July — before announcing in a Sept. 9 video message that she had <a href="https://people.com/kate-middleton-finishes-chemotherapy-after-cancer-diagnosis-new-video-message-8708533" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="3">completed chemotherapy</a>. She made an official royal engagement to Southport, England on Oct. 10 alongside her husband <a href="https://people.com/tag/prince-william/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="4">Prince William</a>, and is taking photographed and private meetings at Windsor Castle as her gradual return to work continues. She is expected to take part in Remembrance Day events, which are in less than two weeks’ time on Sunday, Nov. 10.
</p></div></div>

for (const mutation of mutationList) {
if (mutation.type === 'childList') {

const iframe = parentNode.querySelector('iframe');

gold_text:
The news comes as King Charles and Queen Camilla’s royal tour of Australia and Samoa served as “the perfect tonic” for the King as he continues cancer treatment
    On the heels of King Charles’ royal tour of Australia and Samoa alongside wife Queen Camilla, a palace official said the public should expect more visits abroad from the couple.

The King, 75, and the Queen, 77, left Samoa on Saturday, Oct. 26, just over a week after landing in Australia on Friday, Oct. 18. As Charles continues to receive treatment for cancer — which he is expected to resume upon his return to the U.K. after reportedly pausing it for the tour — multiple outlets reported that he will resume regular overseas trips in 2025 after a hiatus to prioritize his health following his diagnosis earlier this year.

Royal visits will resume in the spring, according to The Guardian, with all trips subject to doctors’ approval. The outlet reported that the King will fly abroad during both the spring and the fall, the traditional periods for official overseas royal visits.

“We’re now working on a pretty normal-looking, full overseas tour program for next year,” a senior palace official said. “Which is a high for us to end on, to know that we can be thinking in those terms, subject to signoff by doctors.”

The King began outpatient treatment for an undisclosed type and stage of cancer in early February. He initially stopped all public-facing duties — though he continued to work behind the scenes — and resumed front-facing royal work on April 30. This recent tour to Australia and Samoa was his first long-distance visit since his diagnosis, which came following a routine procedure for a benign enlarged prostate. (The palace clarified that the King does not have prostate cancer.)

The King’s tour to Australia and Samoa originally also included a third leg to New Zealand, but those plans were scrapped on the advice of his doctors. Though the couple’s schedule was plenty busy — sometimes including up to 10 engagements between them in a single day — there was a rest day factored in after the King and Queen’s long flight into Sydney on Saturday, Oct. 19, and they only took part in one evening event.
“I think it’s great testament to the King’s devotion to service and duty that he was prepared to come this far and he was incredibly happy and very, very determined to do so,” the palace official continued, adding that Charles “genuinely loved” the tour and “genuinely thrived” on the schedule of engagements planned. The tour lifted “his spirits, his mood and his recovery,” the official said.

“In that sense, the tour, despite its demands, has been the perfect tonic,” the official added.

Charles reportedly had two doctors traveling with him on the trip — including his personal doctor, The Telegraph reported — and his medical team ensured his “body is properly looked after,” a senior palace official said, according to the outlet. It resulted in a “very successful visit in these circumstances,” the official added.
The nine-day visit included some protests, particularly in Australia, when Charles was heckled on Monday, Oct. 21 by Indigenous lawmaker Lidia Thorpe at Parliament House in Canberra. 

“He was completely unruffled,” according to a royal official, per the BBC. “He’s been around a long time. As always, [he] kept calm, carried on. He believes free speech is the cornerstone of democracy, and so everyone is entitled to their views.”
He also faced calls to address slavery reparations and continues to face the persistent question of whether Australia will become a republic, leaving him behind as head of state. (Australia is one of 14 countries around the world where Charles is monarch; Barbados was the last country to become a republic, doing so three years ago in 2021.)

The Times quoted a source as saying that the King will not “duck” out of addressing difficult issues: “He is always someone who wants to understand before he says anything,” the source said. “He’s a listener more than he’s a talker. It’s very easy to run away from some of these issues, but the King isn’t one for doing that.”
A palace official added that Camilla is a source of encouragement for Charles, telling the BBC, “The King gets great strength from the Queen being there, not least when she keeps it real.”

Though it’s not yet clear where the King (and presumably the Queen) is headed in 2025, during his final engagement in Samoa, Charles was unexpectedly handed a microphone during a ceremony in the village of Siumu. According to The Times, after thanking Samoa for such a warm welcome, he said, “I shall always remain devoted to this part of the world and hope that I survive long enough to come back again and see you.”

At the end of the tour, Charles and Camilla shared a message on social media marking the end of the historic tour. “As our visits to Australia and Samoa come to a close, my wife and I would like to thank both nations for the warmest of welcomes and for the countless fond memories we will carry in our hearts for many years to come,” the message read.
“Even when we are far apart in distance, the many close connections that unite us across the globe and through our Commonwealth family have been renewed, and will remain as profound as they are enduring,” the message continued.

The Times reported that Charles will take a short rest period before resuming a full schedule of engagements as the holidays approach — and then 2025 and the hopeful normalcy it will bring.

“The idea of these tours always is to leave a trace behind,” a palace aide said, per The Times.

The King’s daughter-in-law Kate Middleton was also diagnosed with cancer earlier this year, following a “planned abdominal surgery” in January. Her diagnosis was announced in March, and she made two official public appearances over the summer — at Trooping the Colour in June and Wimbledon in July — before announcing in a Sept. 9 video message that she had completed chemotherapy. She made an official royal engagement to Southport, England on Oct. 10 alongside her husband Prince William, and is taking photographed and private meetings at Windsor Castle as her gradual return to work continues. She is expected to take part in Remembrance Day events, which are in less than two weeks’ time on Sunday, Nov. 10.

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk {background-color: #FFFFFF;}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-policy-title,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-policy-text,
#onetrust-consent-sdk .ot-b-addl-desc,
#onetrust-consent-sdk .ot-dpd-desc,
#onetrust-consent-sdk .ot-dpd-title,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-policy-text *:not(.onetrust-vendors-list-handler),
#onetrust-consent-sdk .ot-dpd-desc *:not(.onetrust-vendors-list-handler),
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk #banner-options *,
#onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-cat-header {
color: #000000;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .banner-option-details {
background-color: #E9E9E9;}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href],
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href] font,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-link-btn
{
color: #000000;
}#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler,
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-reject-all-handler {
background-color: #000000;border-color: #000000;
color: #FFFFFF;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk *:focus,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk:focus {
outline-color: #000000;
outline-width: 1px;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler.cookie-setting-link {
color: #000000; border-color: #000000;
background-color:
#F2FAFD;
} /***********************************
* TCF BANNER
* APPLY TO EU TEMPLATE
***********************************/
/* Base Selectors - Close Button Container */
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-close-btn-container {
top: 25px;
right: 25px;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .onetrust-close-btn-ui {
width: 12px;
height: 12px;
}
/* Base Selectors - Button Group */
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
text-align: center;
}
/* Base Selectors - Policy Text */
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy-text a.ot-sdk-show-settings {
margin-left: 0;
}
/* Base Selectors - Toggle Label */
#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-tgl .ot-label-status {
display: block!important;
}
/* HTML Overflow Handling */
html:has(>body>div#onetrust-consent-sdk.show-banner) {
overflow-y: hidden;
}
html:has(>body>div#onetrust-consent-sdk.show-banner>div.onetrust-pc-dark-filter[style*="none"]) {
overflow-y: auto;
}
/* Media Queries - Small Screens */
@media only screen and (min-width: 425px) and (max-width: 550px) {
#onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-iab-2 #onetrust-button-group-parent #onetrust-button-group {
width: auto;
}
}
/* Media Queries - Medium Screens */
@media only screen and (min-width: 426px) and (max-width: 896px) {
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .onetrust-close-btn-ui {
top: 0;
right: 0;
}
}
/* Media Queries - Larger Screens */
@media (min-width: 896px) {
#onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-sdk-three.ot-sdk-columns {
left: auto;
right: 4%;
margin-left: 0;
margin-top: 5%;
}
}
@media only screen and (min-width: 769px) {
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
margin-right: 0;
}
}
/* Media Queries - Desktop */
@media only screen and (min-width: 1024px){
#onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-iab-2 #onetrust-button-group-parent {
margin-top: .25em;
}
}
/* hides banner after it has already been interacted with */
#onetrust-consent-sdk:not(.show-banner) #onetrust-banner-sdk {
display: none;
}</style>

<h1 class="article-heading text-headline-400">What Happened to Alissa Turney? The Eerie Details of Her 2001 Disappearance — and Why Its Never Been Solved</h1>
<p class="article-subheading text-utility-300">Oxygen’s documentary ‘Family Secrets: The Disappearance of Alissa Turney’ gives a closer look at the missing person case</p>
