<figcaption id="primary-image__figcap_1-0" class="comp primary-image__figcap mntl-figure-caption figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-text">Alissa Turney.</span>
<span class="figure-article-caption-owner">Credit : <p>Sarah Turney</p></span>
</figcaption></figure>
<div id="article-content_1-0" class="comp article-content mntl-block"><div id="mntl-sc-page_1-0" class="comp mntl-sc-page mntl-block structured-content" data-sc-sticky-offset="90" data-sc-ad-label-height="24" data-sc-ad-track-spacing="100" data-sc-min-track-height="250" data-sc-max-track-height="600" data-sc-breakpoint="50em" data-sc-load-immediate="4" data-sc-content-positions="[1, 1250, 1550, 1950, 2350, 2750, 3150, 3550, 3950]" data-bind-scroll-on-start="true"><p id="mntl-sc-block_1-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> In May 2001, 17-year-old <a href="https://people.com/alissa-turney-case-stepfather-michael-surveillance-cameras-7969701" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">Alissa Turney</a> vanished on the last day of her junior year of high school — and hasn’t been seen since.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_2-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_3-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> For years, the Arizona teen was believed to be a runaway, thanks to a note claiming she had taken off for California. But holes began to emerge in that theory: Alissa left behind all her belongings, including her cell phone and car, and the nearly $1,800 she had saved in the bank remained untouched.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_4-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_5-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Over time, family and friends started to believe something more sinister had occurred to Alissa — and alleged that someone close to her was to blame. In 2008, the investigation into her disappearance was reopened, and her stepfather, Michael Turney, emerged as the prime suspect.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_6-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_7-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Still, it would take 12 more years — and <a href="https://people.com/crime/how-grieving-sister-tiktok-campaign-justice/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">a campaign led by Alissa’s younger sister, Sarah Turney</a> — to bring charges against Michael. In 2020, <a href="https://people.com/crime/alissa-turney-arizona-teen-vanished-stepfather-charged-murder/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="2">Michael was arrested</a> in connection with Alissa’s disappearance, but walked free after a judge <a href="https://www.azcentral.com/story/news/local/phoenix/2023/07/17/michael-turney-acquitted-in-death-of-stepdaughter-alissa-turney/70422458007/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="3" target="_blank" rel="noopener">acquitted him of all charges</a> due to insufficient evidence in 2023.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_8-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_9-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Now, a new documentary attempts to shed light on Alissa’s case, which remains unsolved. <a href="https://people.com/alissa-turney-disappearance-peacock-documentary-exclusive-8714406" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1"><em>Family Secrets: The Disappearance of Alissa Turney</em></a> premieres on Sunday, Oct. 13 at 8 p.m. ET/PT on Oxygen True Crime. Peacock will stream an extended version of the documentary beginning on Tuesday, Oct. 22.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_10-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_11-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> So what happened to Alissa Turney? Here's everything to know about the disappearance case and the different turns it has taken over the past two-plus decades.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_12-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<span class="heading-toc" id="toc-who-is-alissa-turney"></span><h2 id="mntl-sc-block_13-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-heading mntl-sc-block-heading"> <span class="mntl-sc-block-heading__text text-title-300"> Who is Alissa Turney? </span> </h2>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_14-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-square figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">
<div class="img-placeholder" style="padding-bottom:100.0%;">
<img data-src="https://people.com/thmb/ggby2KxUDPu5GWLyQfWKhIHRV-E=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(915x480:917x482):format(webp)/What-Happened-to-Alissa-Turney-Inside-the-17-Year-Old-Disappearance-01-b9fc55d683d14a54a838ecd7afea7ff5.jpg" width="2000" height="2000" data-srcset="https://people.com/thmb/ggby2KxUDPu5GWLyQfWKhIHRV-E=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(915x480:917x482):format(webp)/What-Happened-to-Alissa-Turney-Inside-the-17-Year-Old-Disappearance-01-b9fc55d683d14a54a838ecd7afea7ff5.jpg 4000w" data-sizes="4000px" alt="Alissa Turney" class=" mntl-image mntl-image universal-image__image lazyloadwait" data-expand="300" id="mntl-sc-block-image_1-0" data-click-tracked="true" data-img-lightbox-variant="" data-tracking-container="true" data-img-lightbox="true">
<noscript>
<img
src="https://people.com/thmb/ggby2KxUDPu5GWLyQfWKhIHRV-E=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(915x480:917x482):format(webp)/What-Happened-to-Alissa-Turney-Inside-the-17-Year-Old-Disappearance-01-b9fc55d683d14a54a838ecd7afea7ff5.jpg"
width="2000"
height="2000"

/>
</noscript>
</div> </div>
<figcaption id="mntl-figure-caption_1-0" class="comp mntl-figure-caption text-utility-100 figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-text">Alissa Turney.</span>
<span class="figure-article-caption-owner"><p>Sarah Turney/Instagram</p></span>
</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_15-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Alissa Turney was born on April 3, 1984, in Phoenix, Ariz., to Barbara Farner Strahm and Stephen Strahm, according to <em>20/20</em>. After Alissa’s parents divorced when she was 3 years old, her mother remarried Michael Turney, an electrician and father of three.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_16-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_17-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> The couple welcomed a daughter together, Sarah, and became a large, blended family — with Michael adopting Alissa and her older brother John.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_18-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_19-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Sadly, Barbara died of lung cancer when Alissa was 9 and Sarah was 4, leaving Michael to raise the two young girls solo. (The older four children were grown and living out of the home at that time.)
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_20-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_21-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> As Alissa became a teenager, she would often complain to friends that Michael was strict and overprotective, with him even installing surveillance cameras throughout their Phoenix home. Still, that didn’t stop Alissa from having a steady boyfriend, a part-time job at Jack in the Box and dreams of moving to California.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_22-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_23-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “She knew he was watching her,” Alissa’s boyfriend, Jon Laakman, later told police in footage acquired by <em>20/20</em> and shared exclusively with PEOPLE.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_24-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<span class="heading-toc" id="toc-what-happened-to-alissa-turney"></span><h2 id="mntl-sc-block_25-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-heading mntl-sc-block-heading"> <span class="mntl-sc-block-heading__text text-title-300"> What happened to Alissa Turney? </span> </h2>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_26-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-square figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">
<div class="img-placeholder" style="padding-bottom:86.6%;">
<img data-src="https://people.com/thmb/yq4DU0Ote7FYGSLODvDeCCGPQZc=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(940x873:942x875):format(webp)/What-Happened-to-Alissa-Turney-Inside-the-17-Year-Old-Disappearance-02-23dd69daf5624182b1dd2e2558878f39.jpg" width="2000" height="1733" data-srcset="https://people.com/thmb/yq4DU0Ote7FYGSLODvDeCCGPQZc=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(940x873:942x875):format(webp)/What-Happened-to-Alissa-Turney-Inside-the-17-Year-Old-Disappearance-02-23dd69daf5624182b1dd2e2558878f39.jpg 4000w" data-sizes="4000px" alt="Alissa Turney" class=" mntl-image mntl-image universal-image__image lazyloadwait" data-expand="300" id="mntl-sc-block-image_2-0" data-click-tracked="true" data-img-lightbox-variant="" data-tracking-container="true" data-img-lightbox="true">

</noscript>
</div> </div>
<figcaption id="mntl-figure-caption_2-0" class="comp mntl-figure-caption text-utility-100 figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-text">Alissa Turney.</span>
<span class="figure-article-caption-owner"><p>Sarah Turney/Instagram</p></span>
</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_27-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Alissa disappeared on May 17, 2001, the last day of her junior year at Paradise Valley High School in Phoenix. She was 17 years old at the time.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_28-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_29-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> The last person to reportedly see Alissa before she vanished was her stepfather, Michael. According to police records, Alissa stopped by her boyfriend Jon's workshop class around 11 a.m. that day to tell him she was leaving school early and Michael was picking her up. Michael later told authorities that he’d taken Alissa out for lunch that afternoon, and the two had an argument before he dropped her off at home around 1 p.m.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_30-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_31-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Hours later, Michael contacted Phoenix Police and told them that Alissa had run away — but did not take her clothing, cell phone, makeup, jewelry or car. She also reportedly left behind a note in her bedroom that stated she was headed to California, where her aunt lived.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_32-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_33-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “I wasn’t worried,” Alissa’s younger sister Sarah told PEOPLE in 2020. “I was under the impression she was going to be back. I don’t think her being gone forever was anything that ever crossed my mind.”
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_34-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_35-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Despite Michael’s claims that Alissa ran away, police opened a missing persons case. That said, they didn't drive to his house to interview him or search her room, even after her aunt revealed she never showed up in California.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_36-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_37-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> In the meantime, Michael doubled down on the idea that Alissa was on the West Coast, telling authorities on May 24 that the missing teen had called him from a payphone in Riverside, Calif., before immediately hanging up.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_38-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_39-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> That alleged tip yielded no leads, however, and the investigation into Alissa’s disappearance stalled for several years.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_40-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_41-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “Nobody looked for her,” Sarah said in <a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@saraheturney/video/7406022113221430571" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" target="_blank" rel="noopener">a TikTok video</a>. “Not anybody in my family. The police didn’t do anything despite her being reported missing. Nothing really happened until 2006.”
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_42-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_43-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> At that time, serial killer Thomas Hymer — who was serving a life sentence in a Florida prison — confessed to murdering Alissa, according to <a href="https://abcnews.go.com/Primetime/police-investigate-stepfather-case-missing-teen/story?id=8192217" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" target="_blank" rel="noopener">ABC News</a>. When Phoenix police flew to Florida to question Hymer, though, they realized the confession was false.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_44-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_45-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> While Hymer’s claims didn’t bring authorities any closer to locating Alissa, it renewed attention to her case — and a new prime suspect: Michael.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_46-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<span class="heading-toc" id="toc-what-was-michael-turney-accused-of"></span><h2 id="mntl-sc-block_47-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-heading mntl-sc-block-heading"> <span class="mntl-sc-block-heading__text text-title-300"> What was Michael Turney accused of? </span> </h2>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_48-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-landscape figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">
<div class="img-placeholder" style="padding-bottom:66.6%;">
<img data-src="https://people.com/thmb/CBqpCcrrnE4F-rHRnE3HXT8s0Jk=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(659x469:661x471):format(webp)/michael-alissa-turney-89d5fd3a04b44bfb8d803de8ba486589.jpg" width="1500" height="1000" data-srcset="https://people.com/thmb/CBqpCcrrnE4F-rHRnE3HXT8s0Jk=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(659x469:661x471):format(webp)/michael-alissa-turney-89d5fd3a04b44bfb8d803de8ba486589.jpg 4000w" data-sizes="4000px" alt="Alissa and Michael Turney" class=" mntl-image mntl-image universal-image__image lazyloadwait" data-expand="300" id="mntl-sc-block-image_3-0" data-click-tracked="true" data-img-lightbox-variant="" data-tracking-container="true" data-img-lightbox="true">
<noscript>
<img
src="https://people.com/thmb/CBqpCcrrnE4F-rHRnE3HXT8s0Jk=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(659x469:661x471):format(webp)/michael-alissa-turney-89d5fd3a04b44bfb8d803de8ba486589.jpg"
width="1500"
height="1000"
class="img--noscript mntl-image mntl-image universal-image__image"
srcset="https://people.com/thmb/CBqpCcrrnE4F-rHRnE3HXT8s0Jk=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(659x469:661x471):format(webp)/michael-alissa-turney-89d5fd3a04b44bfb8d803de8ba486589.jpg 4000w"
sizes="4000px"
alt="Alissa and Michael Turney"
/>
</noscript>
</div> </div>
<figcaption id="mntl-figure-caption_3-0" class="comp mntl-figure-caption text-utility-100 figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-text">Alissa Turney and her step father Michael Turney.</span>
<span class="figure-article-caption-owner">Courtesy Sarah Turney</span>
</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_49-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> After Hymer’s false confession, detectives reopened the case of Alissa’s disappearance in 2008 and began conducting more than 200 interviews with those closest to the teenager, per <a href="https://www.buzzfeednews.com/article/amberjamieson/alissa-turneys-stepfather-charged-with-murder" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Buzzfeed News</a>. In these interviews, many of Alissa’s closest friends alleged that Michael had been verbally and sexually abusive to his stepdaughter for years.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_50-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_51-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “He always made me uncomfortable, from the moment I met him,” Charity Behrend, Alissa’s longtime friend, told PEOPLE in 2020.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_52-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_53-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> As a result, detectives attempted to search Alissa’s room in 2008 — but Michael wouldn’t let them into his home. Since then, “Michael Turney has refused to cooperate with the investigation” and “is the only member of the Turney family not to cooperate,” according to police documents provided to PEOPLE at the time.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_54-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_55-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> By December 2008, the police believed Michael was responsible for Alissa’s disappearance, according to <a href="https://melmagazine.com/en-us/story/alissa-turney-unsolved-disappearance" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" target="_blank" rel="noopener">MEL magazine</a>. They executed a search warrant on his home, which turned up an alarming discovery that had nothing to do with Alissa.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_56-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_57-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Police found dozens of homemade bombs, 19 firearms, two silencers and a 98-page manifesto detailing Michael’s plot to commit mass murder at the local headquarters of the electrical workers union, according to the outlet.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_58-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_59-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> In April 2010, Michael pleaded guilty to <a href="https://archives.fbi.gov/archives/phoenix/press-releases/2010/px040110.htm" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" target="_blank" rel="noopener">possession of unregistered destructive devices</a> and spent the next seven years in federal prison.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_60-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_61-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “We bumbled, for lack of a better word, into his bombing plot,” Detective William Andersen said during a <a href="https://www.facebook.com/watch/live/?ref=watch_permalink&v=301025537844071" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" target="_blank" rel="noopener">2020 press conference</a>. “Him going to jail for that is not justice for Alissa.”
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_62-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<span class="heading-toc" id="toc-what-was-michael-turney-charged-with"></span><h2 id="mntl-sc-block_63-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-heading mntl-sc-block-heading"> <span class="mntl-sc-block-heading__text text-title-300"> What was Michael Turney charged with? </span> </h2>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_64-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-portrait figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">
<div class="img-placeholder" style="padding-bottom:105.7%;">
<img data-src="https://people.com/thmb/U1L9jusV26S-qeQ8LIbZou5rXD0=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(708x0:710x2):format(webp)/michael-turney-df7410b4fc8c4cf98ae5fc51d2422213.jpg" width="1419" height="1500" data-srcset="https://people.com/thmb/U1L9jusV26S-qeQ8LIbZou5rXD0=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(708x0:710x2):format(webp)/michael-turney-df7410b4fc8c4cf98ae5fc51d2422213.jpg 4000w" data-sizes="4000px" alt="Michael Turney" class=" mntl-image mntl-image universal-image__image lazyloadwait" data-expand="300" id="mntl-sc-block-image_4-0" data-click-tracked="true" data-img-lightbox-variant="" data-tracking-container="true" data-img-lightbox="true">
<noscript>
<img
src="https://people.com/thmb/U1L9jusV26S-qeQ8LIbZou5rXD0=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(708x0:710x2):format(webp)/michael-turney-df7410b4fc8c4cf98ae5fc51d2422213.jpg"
width="1419"
height="1500"
class="img--noscript mntl-image mntl-image universal-image__image"
srcset="https://people.com/thmb/U1L9jusV26S-qeQ8LIbZou5rXD0=/4000x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(708x0:710x2):format(webp)/michael-turney-df7410b4fc8c4cf98ae5fc51d2422213.jpg 4000w"
sizes="4000px"
alt="Michael Turney"
/>
</noscript>
</div> </div>
<figcaption id="mntl-figure-caption_4-0" class="comp mntl-figure-caption text-utility-100 figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-text">Michael Turney.</span>
<span class="figure-article-caption-owner">Maricopa County Sheriff's Office</span>
</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_65-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> With Michael behind bars on the bombing charges, detectives encouraged Sarah to generate publicity about her sister’s case in hopes that it might produce new leads or evidence.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_66-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_67-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Sarah (who, along with her siblings, believes Michael is responsible for Alissa’s presumed murder) did just that: She launched multiple social media pages dedicated to Alissa’s disappearance, created a <a href="https://www.voicesforjusticepodcast.com/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank">successful podcast</a> about the case and started an <a href="https://www.thepetitionsite.com/842/331/976/demand-michael-turney-go-to-trial-for-the-death-of-alissa-turney/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="2" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank">online petition</a> calling for Michael’s arrest, which garnered nearly 300,000 signatures.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_68-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_69-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Sarah’s podcast, <em>Voices for Justice</em>, and her <a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@saraheturney" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" target="_blank" rel="noopener">viral TikTok videos</a>, which have been viewed by tens of millions of people, helped renew interest in the cold case.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_70-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_71-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> In her audio show, she presented evidence against her father, including audio from home footage of Alissa calling Michael a “pervert” in 1997 and secretly recorded audio from a 2017 conversation with her father where he said he would provide “all the honest answers you want to hear” on his deathbed.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_72-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_73-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> These recordings helped make the case for Michael’s arrest. On Aug. 20, 2020, he was arrested and charged with a single count of second-degree felony murder in Mesa, Ariz., for the death of Alissa, PEOPLE confirmed at the time.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_74-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_75-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “I’m shaking and I’m crying,” Sarah wrote <a href="https://x.com/SarahETurney/status/1296559814487621632" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank">on X</a> (formerly Twitter) about the news. “We did it you guys. He’s been arrested. Omg 😭 thank you. #justiceforalissa Never give up hope that you can get justice. It took almost 20 years but we did it.”
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_76-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_77-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> At a <a href="https://www.facebook.com/watch/live/?ref=watch_permalink&v=2375775926062985" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" target="_blank" rel="noopener">press conference</a> announcing Michael’s indictment, Maricopa County Attorney Allister Adel credited Sarah’s efforts for her older sister.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_78-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_79-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “Sarah Turney, your perseverance and commitment to finding justice for your sister Alissa is a testament to the love of a sister," she said. "Because of that love, Alissa’s light has never gone out and she lives on in the stories and photos you’ve shared with the community."
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_80-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_81-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Adel continued, “This passion you have demonstrated to her during your journey is something that will keep Alissa’s memory alive forever.”
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_82-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<span class="heading-toc" id="toc-what-happened-to-michael-turney"></span><h2 id="mntl-sc-block_83-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-heading mntl-sc-block-heading"> <span class="mntl-sc-block-heading__text text-title-300"> What happened to Michael Turney? </span> </h2>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_84-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Michael’s trial related to the presumed murder of Alissa began in July 2023, nearly three years after his initial arrest.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_85-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_86-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> After six days of testimony from witnesses, including Phoenix police detectives Stuart Somershoe and William Andersen, Alissa’s boyfriend at the time Jon and her sister Sarah, the defense submitted a motion for an acquittal under an Arizona statute.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_87-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_88-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> It read, “the court must enter a judgment of acquittal ... if there is no substantial evidence to support a conviction,” <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/dateline/cold-case-spotlight/charges-dismissed-michael-turney-connection-17-year-old-stepdaughter-a-rcna94830" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" target="_blank" rel="noopener">NBC News</a> reported. The defense argued that the prosecution did not present any physical evidence that Alissa was dead — or that Michael caused her presumed death.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_89-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_90-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “There has not been a shred of physical evidence in this case. No body, no crime scene, no evidence to suggest that a murder took place,” defense attorney Olivia Hicks said in court.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_91-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_92-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> The judge agreed with the defense and dismissed all of the charges against Michael. He was released from custody on July 18, 2023.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_93-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_94-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “While, of course, this is not the result any of us wanted, we’re grateful for the Maricopa County Attorney’s Office for taking Alissa’s case to trial,” Sarah said in <a href="https://open.spotify.com/episode/3qqgZSARfhcNmyxjobGivH" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank">a statement released on her podcast</a>, <em>Voices for Justice</em>. She continues to share on social media and on her podcast evidence of what she believes is her father’s crime.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_95-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_96-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> But Michael, who has maintained his innocence in Alissa’s presumed death for years, has also turned to the internet since his acquittal.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_97-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_98-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> He launched his own <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@user-rt1kz6wl5o" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" target="_blank" rel="noopener">YouTube channel</a> and has plans to start a podcast and write a book, according to <em>Voices for Justice</em>. Michael also filed a lawsuit against Phoenix police and county prosecutors in January 2024, alleging wrongful imprisonment and a violation of his rights, according to the <a href="https://www.phoenixnewtimes.com/news/acquitted-of-killing-stepdaughter-michael-turney-sues-phoenix-police-18042046" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="2" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><em>Phoenix New Times</em></a>.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_99-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_100-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “I would really like to clear my name before I die,” Michael said in a <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qHw46xWmIZ4" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" target="_blank" rel="noopener">YouTube video</a> from September 2024, in which he also alleges that the Phoenix Police framed him out of revenge for exposing corruption. “The truth will always come out, it just takes time.”
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_101-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<span class="heading-toc" id="toc-was-alissa-turney-ever-found"></span><h2 id="mntl-sc-block_102-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-heading mntl-sc-block-heading"> <span class="mntl-sc-block-heading__text text-title-300"> Was Alissa Turney ever found? </span> </h2>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_103-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-square figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">

<figcaption id="mntl-figure-caption_5-0" class="comp mntl-figure-caption text-utility-100 figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-text">Alissa Turney.</span>
<span class="figure-article-caption-owner"><p>Sarah Turney</p></span>
</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_104-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> As of October 2024, Alissa’s body has never been recovered. Her stepfather, Michael, insists to this day that he does not know what happened to her.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_105-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_106-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “I have no idea where Alissa is, alive or dead,” he told NBC’s <a href="https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/michael-turney-alissa-disappearance-murder-charges-rcna127059" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><em>Dateline</em></a>.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_107-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_108-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Sarah, however, believes her older sister is deceased — and remains on the hunt for justice.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_109-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_110-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “In my heart, I feel certain that Alissa is gone,” she told <a href="https://www.nytimes.com/2020/08/26/us/alissa-turney-update.html" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><em>The New York Times</em></a> in 2020. “It took me a very, very long time to come to that conclusion, and there was so much guilt there when I did.”
</p></div></div>

const iframe = parentNode.querySelector('iframe');
if (iframe !== null) {
// Overwrite iframe title attr with title from Selene
iframe.title = embedTitle;
observer.disconnect();
// Early return, prevent further looping for other mutations
return;
}
}
}
}
function observeChildNodeChanges(embed) {
const config = {
childList: true,
subtree: true
};
/* Explicitly use arrow function for the callback executed on
observed node to pass in embed title to overwrite iframe title */
const observer = new MutationObserver((mutationList) => {
overwriteIframeTitle(mutationList, embed.dataset.title, observer);
});
observer.observe(embed, config);
}
function observerCallback(entries, observer) {
entries.forEach((entry) => {
if (entry.isIntersecting) {
const digiohEmbed = entry.target;
if (Mntl.digioh.initialized) {
observer.unobserve(digiohEmbed);
} else {
Mntl.digioh.types.load(() => observer.unobserve(digiohEmbed));
}
}
});
}
const digiohEmbeds = document.querySelectorAll('.mntl-sc-block-digiohembed__container');
const options = { rootMargin: '300px' };
const observer = new IntersectionObserver(observerCallback, options);
digiohEmbeds.forEach((embed) => {
observer.observe(embed);
observeChildNodeChanges(embed);
});
}
}
};
if (Mntl.digioh.type) Mntl.digioh.types[Mntl.digioh.type]();
})(window.Mntl || {});
});
</script>

gold_text:
Oxygen’s documentary ‘Family Secrets: The Disappearance of Alissa Turney’ gives a closer look at the missing person case
In May 2001, 17-year-old Alissa Turney vanished on the last day of her junior year of high school — and hasn’t been seen since.

For years, the Arizona teen was believed to be a runaway, thanks to a note claiming she had taken off for California. But holes began to emerge in that theory: Alissa left behind all her belongings, including her cell phone and car, and the nearly $1,800 she had saved in the bank remained untouched.

Over time, family and friends started to believe something more sinister had occurred to Alissa — and alleged that someone close to her was to blame. In 2008, the investigation into her disappearance was reopened, and her stepfather, Michael Turney, emerged as the prime suspect.

Still, it would take 12 more years — and a campaign led by Alissa’s younger sister, Sarah Turney — to bring charges against Michael. In 2020, Michael was arrested in connection with Alissa’s disappearance, but walked free after a judge acquitted him of all charges due to insufficient evidence in 2023.

Now, a new documentary attempts to shed light on Alissa’s case, which remains unsolved. Family Secrets: The Disappearance of Alissa Turney premieres on Sunday, Oct. 13 at 8 p.m. ET/PT on Oxygen True Crime. Peacock will stream an extended version of the documentary beginning on Tuesday, Oct. 22.

So what happened to Alissa Turney? Here's everything to know about the disappearance case and the different turns it has taken over the past two-plus decades.
Who is Alissa Turney?
Alissa Turney was born on April 3, 1984, in Phoenix, Ariz., to Barbara Farner Strahm and Stephen Strahm, according to 20/20. After Alissa’s parents divorced when she was 3 years old, her mother remarried Michael Turney, an electrician and father of three.

The couple welcomed a daughter together, Sarah, and became a large, blended family — with Michael adopting Alissa and her older brother John.

Sadly, Barbara died of lung cancer when Alissa was 9 and Sarah was 4, leaving Michael to raise the two young girls solo. (The older four children were grown and living out of the home at that time.)

As Alissa became a teenager, she would often complain to friends that Michael was strict and overprotective, with him even installing surveillance cameras throughout their Phoenix home. Still, that didn’t stop Alissa from having a steady boyfriend, a part-time job at Jack in the Box and dreams of moving to California.

“She knew he was watching her,” Alissa’s boyfriend, Jon Laakman, later told police in footage acquired by 20/20 and shared exclusively with PEOPLE.
What happened to Alissa Turney?
Alissa disappeared on May 17, 2001, the last day of her junior year at Paradise Valley High School in Phoenix. She was 17 years old at the time.

The last person to reportedly see Alissa before she vanished was her stepfather, Michael. According to police records, Alissa stopped by her boyfriend Jon's workshop class around 11 a.m. that day to tell him she was leaving school early and Michael was picking her up. Michael later told authorities that he’d taken Alissa out for lunch that afternoon, and the two had an argument before he dropped her off at home around 1 p.m.

Hours later, Michael contacted Phoenix Police and told them that Alissa had run away — but did not take her clothing, cell phone, makeup, jewelry or car. She also reportedly left behind a note in her bedroom that stated she was headed to California, where her aunt lived.

“I wasn’t worried,” Alissa’s younger sister Sarah told PEOPLE in 2020. “I was under the impression she was going to be back. I don’t think her being gone forever was anything that ever crossed my mind.”

Despite Michael’s claims that Alissa ran away, police opened a missing persons case. That said, they didn't drive to his house to interview him or search her room, even after her aunt revealed she never showed up in California.

In the meantime, Michael doubled down on the idea that Alissa was on the West Coast, telling authorities on May 24 that the missing teen had called him from a payphone in Riverside, Calif., before immediately hanging up.

That alleged tip yielded no leads, however, and the investigation into Alissa’s disappearance stalled for several years.

“Nobody looked for her,” Sarah said in a TikTok video. “Not anybody in my family. The police didn’t do anything despite her being reported missing. Nothing really happened until 2006.”

At that time, serial killer Thomas Hymer — who was serving a life sentence in a Florida prison — confessed to murdering Alissa, according to ABC News. When Phoenix police flew to Florida to question Hymer, though, they realized the confession was false.

While Hymer’s claims didn’t bring authorities any closer to locating Alissa, it renewed attention to her case — and a new prime suspect: Michael.

What was Michael Turney accused of?
After Hymer’s false confession, detectives reopened the case of Alissa’s disappearance in 2008 and began conducting more than 200 interviews with those closest to the teenager, per Buzzfeed News. In these interviews, many of Alissa’s closest friends alleged that Michael had been verbally and sexually abusive to his stepdaughter for years.

“He always made me uncomfortable, from the moment I met him,” Charity Behrend, Alissa’s longtime friend, told PEOPLE in 2020.

As a result, detectives attempted to search Alissa’s room in 2008 — but Michael wouldn’t let them into his home. Since then, “Michael Turney has refused to cooperate with the investigation” and “is the only member of the Turney family not to cooperate,” according to police documents provided to PEOPLE at the time.

By December 2008, the police believed Michael was responsible for Alissa’s disappearance, according to MEL magazine. They executed a search warrant on his home, which turned up an alarming discovery that had nothing to do with Alissa.

Police found dozens of homemade bombs, 19 firearms, two silencers and a 98-page manifesto detailing Michael’s plot to commit mass murder at the local headquarters of the electrical workers union, according to the outlet.

In April 2010, Michael pleaded guilty to possession of unregistered destructive devices and spent the next seven years in federal prison.

“We bumbled, for lack of a better word, into his bombing plot,” Detective William Andersen said during a 2020 press conference. “Him going to jail for that is not justice for Alissa.”

What was Michael Turney charged with?

With Michael behind bars on the bombing charges, detectives encouraged Sarah to generate publicity about her sister’s case in hopes that it might produce new leads or evidence.

Sarah (who, along with her siblings, believes Michael is responsible for Alissa’s presumed murder) did just that: She launched multiple social media pages dedicated to Alissa’s disappearance, created a successful podcast about the case and started an online petition calling for Michael’s arrest, which garnered nearly 300,000 signatures.

Sarah’s podcast, Voices for Justice, and her viral TikTok videos, which have been viewed by tens of millions of people, helped renew interest in the cold case.

In her audio show, she presented evidence against her father, including audio from home footage of Alissa calling Michael a “pervert” in 1997 and secretly recorded audio from a 2017 conversation with her father where he said he would provide “all the honest answers you want to hear” on his deathbed.

These recordings helped make the case for Michael’s arrest. On Aug. 20, 2020, he was arrested and charged with a single count of second-degree felony murder in Mesa, Ariz., for the death of Alissa, PEOPLE confirmed at the time.

“I’m shaking and I’m crying,” Sarah wrote on X (formerly Twitter) about the news. “We did it you guys. He’s been arrested. Omg 😭 thank you. #justiceforalissa Never give up hope that you can get justice. It took almost 20 years but we did it.”

At a press conference announcing Michael’s indictment, Maricopa County Attorney Allister Adel credited Sarah’s efforts for her older sister.

“Sarah Turney, your perseverance and commitment to finding justice for your sister Alissa is a testament to the love of a sister," she said. "Because of that love, Alissa’s light has never gone out and she lives on in the stories and photos you’ve shared with the community."

Adel continued, “This passion you have demonstrated to her during your journey is something that will keep Alissa’s memory alive forever.”

What happened to Michael Turney?
Michael’s trial related to the presumed murder of Alissa began in July 2023, nearly three years after his initial arrest.

After six days of testimony from witnesses, including Phoenix police detectives Stuart Somershoe and William Andersen, Alissa’s boyfriend at the time Jon and her sister Sarah, the defense submitted a motion for an acquittal under an Arizona statute.

It read, “the court must enter a judgment of acquittal ... if there is no substantial evidence to support a conviction,” NBC News reported. The defense argued that the prosecution did not present any physical evidence that Alissa was dead — or that Michael caused her presumed death.

“There has not been a shred of physical evidence in this case. No body, no crime scene, no evidence to suggest that a murder took place,” defense attorney Olivia Hicks said in court.

The judge agreed with the defense and dismissed all of the charges against Michael. He was released from custody on July 18, 2023.

“While, of course, this is not the result any of us wanted, we’re grateful for the Maricopa County Attorney’s Office for taking Alissa’s case to trial,” Sarah said in a statement released on her podcast, Voices for Justice. She continues to share on social media and on her podcast evidence of what she believes is her father’s crime.

But Michael, who has maintained his innocence in Alissa’s presumed death for years, has also turned to the internet since his acquittal.

He launched his own YouTube channel and has plans to start a podcast and write a book, according to Voices for Justice. Michael also filed a lawsuit against Phoenix police and county prosecutors in January 2024, alleging wrongful imprisonment and a violation of his rights, according to the Phoenix New Times.

“I would really like to clear my name before I die,” Michael said in a YouTube video from September 2024, in which he also alleges that the Phoenix Police framed him out of revenge for exposing corruption. “The truth will always come out, it just takes time.”

Was Alissa Turney ever found?
As of October 2024, Alissa’s body has never been recovered. Her stepfather, Michael, insists to this day that he does not know what happened to her.

“I have no idea where Alissa is, alive or dead,” he told NBC’s Dateline.

Sarah, however, believes her older sister is deceased — and remains on the hunt for justice.

“In my heart, I feel certain that Alissa is gone,” she told The New York Times in 2020. “It took me a very, very long time to come to that conclusion, and there was so much guilt there when I did.”

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk *:focus,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk:focus {

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler.cookie-setting-link {

background-color:
#F2FAFD;
} /***********************************
* TCF BANNER
* APPLY TO EU TEMPLATE
***********************************/
/* Base Selectors - Close Button Container */
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-close-btn-container {
top: 25px;
right: 25px;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .onetrust-close-btn-ui {
width: 12px;
height: 12px;
}
/* Base Selectors - Button Group */
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
text-align: center;
}
/* Base Selectors - Policy Text */
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy-text a.ot-sdk-show-settings {
margin-left: 0;
}
/* Base Selectors - Toggle Label */
#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-tgl .ot-label-status {
display: block!important;
}
/* HTML Overflow Handling */
html:has(>body>div#onetrust-consent-sdk.show-banner) {
overflow-y: hidden;
}
html:has(>body>div#onetrust-consent-sdk.show-banner>div.onetrust-pc-dark-filter[style*="none"]) {

}
/* Media Queries - Small Screens */
@media only screen and (min-width: 425px) and (max-width: 550px) {
#onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-iab-2 #onetrust-button-group-parent #onetrust-button-group {
width: auto;
}
}
/* Media Queries - Medium Screens */
@media only screen and (min-width: 426px) and (max-width: 896px) {
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .onetrust-close-btn-ui {
top: 0;
right: 0;
}
}
/* Media Queries - Larger Screens */
@media (min-width: 896px) {
#onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-sdk-three.ot-sdk-columns {
left: auto;
right: 4%;
margin-left: 0;
margin-top: 5%;
}
}
@media only screen and (min-width: 769px) {
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
margin-right: 0;
}
}
/* Media Queries - Desktop */
@media only screen and (min-width: 1024px){
#onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-iab-2 #onetrust-button-group-parent {
margin-top: .25em;
}
}
/* hides banner after it has already been interacted with */
#onetrust-consent-sdk:not(.show-banner) #onetrust-banner-sdk {
display: none;
}</style>

<figcaption id="primary-image__figcap_1-0" class="comp primary-image__figcap mntl-figure-caption figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-text">Blake Lively poses in her home and jokes her hidden talent is interior design.</span>
<span class="figure-article-caption-owner">Credit : <p>Blake Lively/Instagram</p></span>
</figcaption></figure>
<div id="article-content_1-0" class="comp article-content mntl-block"><div id="mntl-sc-page_1-0" class="comp mntl-sc-page mntl-block structured-content" data-sc-sticky-offset="90" data-sc-ad-label-height="24" data-sc-ad-track-spacing="100" data-sc-min-track-height="250" data-sc-max-track-height="600" data-sc-breakpoint="50em" data-sc-load-immediate="4" data-sc-content-positions="[1, 1250, 1550, 1950, 2350, 2750, 3150, 3550, 3950]" data-bind-scroll-on-start="true"><p id="mntl-sc-block_1-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> <a href="https://people.com/tag/blake-lively/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">Blake Lively</a> is adding interior design to her already stacked resume! 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_2-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_3-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> In an <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/C1f1k1EJNk1/?img_index=1" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Instagram</a> post on Sunday, the <em>Age of Adaline</em> actress, 36, highlighted <a href="https://people.com/blake-lively-2023-memories-squeezing-into-gold-sequins-michael-kors-fashion-week-8421267" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="2">a favorite look of hers from 2023</a> and also revealed that she’s been secretly hiding her interior design skills from the world until now. 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_4-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_5-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Lively posed in a gold sequin jumpsuit at her home and offered a glimpse inside her space, including what appeared to be her primary bedroom and bathroom that she shares with husband <a href="https://people.com/tag/ryan-reynolds/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">Ryan Reynolds</a>.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_6-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_7-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> After giving a shout-out to Michael Kors for the sparkling outfit in the caption, the actress joked, “and yes I low key moonlight as an interior designer but please don’t tell bc I definitely don’t want the world to know that I have a hidden talent which I require external validation on.”
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_8-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_9-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-featuredlink mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link--related"><a href="https://people.com/blake-lively-shows-skin-at-beyonce-renaissance-film-premiere-london-see-outfit-photos-8409322" rel="nocaes" id="mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link__link_1-0" class="mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link__link mntl-text-link text-utility-300 global-link" data-tracking-container="true" data-tracking-id="featured-link"><span class="link__wrapper">Blake Lively Shows Some Skin in Sexy Set at Beyoncé’s <em>Renaissance</em> Film Premiere in London </span></a>
</div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_10-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_11-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-embed mntl-sc-block-universal-embed mntl-sc-block-embed--instagram"><iframe id="mntl-sc-block_11-0-iframe" class="mntl-sc-block-universal-embed--iframe-legacy lazyloadwait" allowfullscreen="false" frameborder="0" sandbox="allow-forms allow-popups allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation" title="Blake Lively Instagram " data-expand="300" data-src="/embed?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fp%2FC1f1k1EJNk1%2F%3Fimg_index%3D2&id=mntl-sc-block_11-0-iframe&options=e30%3D&docId=8421811"></iframe></div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_12-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_13-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> The bedroom is clad in a rustic, gray-tone wood on the floors and an accent wall. Exposed beams on the ceiling and black-framed windows add to the industrial loft vibe. The upholstered bed, soft beige wall color and gold sconce soften the look. Her followers also got a peek inside her bathroom, which features a marble free-standing bathtub.
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_14-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_15-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Fans of Lively couldn’t help but gush over her home’s style and how relatable she is for posting her unmade bed in the comments. 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_16-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_17-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> “I love that your first photo is you looking stunning with an unmade bed,” one user wrote. “Thanks for keeping it real for all of us real peeps.” Others requested a full house tour, especially a closer look at the bathroom. 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_18-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_19-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-featuredlink mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link--related"><a href="https://people.com/blake-lively-mom-elaine-model-jewelry-together-in-selfie-8417963" rel="nocaes" id="mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link__link_2-0" class="mntl-sc-block-universal-featured-link__link mntl-text-link text-utility-300 global-link" data-tracking-container="true" data-tracking-id="featured-link"><span class="link__wrapper">Blake Lively Says She Gets Her 'Maximalist' Style from Her Mom in Rare Selfie of the Two</span></a>
</div>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_20-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_21-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-portrait figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">

<figcaption id="mntl-figure-caption_1-0" class="comp mntl-figure-caption text-utility-100 figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-text">Blake Lively (right) and Ryan Reynolds (left) pose on the beach together.</span>
<span class="figure-article-caption-owner"><p>Ryan Reynolds/Instagram</p></span>
</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_22-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Lively’s husband of 12 years also shared a <a href="https://people.com/ryan-reynolds-thanks-2023-year-playing-with-people-he-loves-new-photo-carousel-8420993" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">roundup of highlights from 2023</a> on <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/C1fr1DORgPw/?utm_source=ig_embed&ig_rid=987d2cb3-c582-45b8-8ca5-2a77f696402d&img_index=1" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="2" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Instagram</a>. Included in the mix of photos was a cute snap of Reynolds with his arm wrapped around his wife. The couple posed together on the beach in front of a rainbow. 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_23-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_24-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> The couple have four children together — daughters James, 9, Inez, 7, Betty, 4, and <a href="https://people.com/parents/blake-lively-and-ryan-reynolds-welcome-fourth-baby/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">a fourth baby</a> they welcomed in February.   
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_25-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_26-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> <strong><em>Never miss a story — sign up for <a href="https://forms.dotdashmeredith.com/people-news-inline" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="1" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank">PEOPLE's free daily newsletter</a> to stay up-to-date on the best of what PEOPLE has to offer, from juicy celebrity news to compelling human interest stories.</em></strong>
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_27-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<figure id="mntl-sc-block_28-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block people-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image mntl-sc-block-image--no-theme no-theme figure-portrait figure-high-res"> <div class="figure-media">

<figcaption id="mntl-figure-caption_2-0" class="comp mntl-figure-caption text-utility-100 figure-article-caption"> <span class="figure-article-caption-text">Ryan Reynolds poses with wife Blake Lively and Taylor Swift at the Chiefs-Jets game at MetLife Stadium in October.</span>
<span class="figure-article-caption-owner"><p>Ryan Reynolds/Instagram</p></span>
</figcaption></figure>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_29-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> Reynolds also added a group photo in the post, in which he is seen posing beside his wife and her BFF <a href="https://people.com/tag/taylor-swift/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">Taylor Swift</a> at the <a href="https://people.com/taylor-swift-blake-lively-kansas-city-chiefs-8303320" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="2">Chiefs-Jets game</a> at MetLife Stadium in October. Lively and Swift have been <a href="https://people.com/celebrity/taylor-swift-blake-lively-friendship-timeline/#:~:text=Taylor%20Swift%20and%20Blake%20Lively's%20friendship%20just%20keeps%20getting%20sweeter,music%20video%20in%20the%20caption." data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="3">friends for almost a decade</a> and are often spotted <a href="https://people.com/inside-emilios-ballato-italian-restaurant-new-york-taylor-swift-girls-night-8304066" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="4">hanging out together in New York City</a> at restaurants like <a href="https://www.ballatos.com/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="externalLink" data-ordinal="5" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank">Emilio’s Ballato</a> in NoLita. 
</p>
<div id="mntl-sc-block_30-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-adslot mntl-block"></div>
<p id="mntl-sc-block_31-0" class="comp mntl-sc-block mntl-sc-block-html"> In December, the actress celebrated her Swift’s 34th birthday alongside pals <a href="https://people.com/tag/gigi-hadid/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="1">Gigi Hadid</a>, <a href="https://people.com/tag/jack-antonoff/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="2">Jack Antonoff</a>, <a href="https://people.com/taylor-swift-sabrina-carpenter-friendship-timeline-7749969" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="3">Sabrina Carpenter</a>, <a href="https://people.com/tag/zoe-kravitz/" data-component="link" data-source="inlineLink" data-type="internalLink" data-ordinal="4">Zoë Kravitz</a> and more.
</p></div></div>

gold_text:
The ‘Gossip Girl’ alum revealed her hidden talent in a roundup of 2023 memories shared to Instagram on Sunday

Blake Lively is adding interior design to her already stacked resume! 

In an Instagram post on Sunday, the Age of Adaline actress, 36, highlighted a favorite look of hers from 2023 and also revealed that she’s been secretly hiding her interior design skills from the world until now. 

Lively posed in a gold sequin jumpsuit at her home and offered a glimpse inside her space, including what appeared to be her primary bedroom and bathroom that she shares with husband Ryan Reynolds.

After giving a shout-out to Michael Kors for the sparkling outfit in the caption, the actress joked, “and yes I low key moonlight as an interior designer but please don’t tell bc I definitely don’t want the world to know that I have a hidden talent which I require external validation on.”

The bedroom is clad in a rustic, gray-tone wood on the floors and an accent wall. Exposed beams on the ceiling and black-framed windows add to the industrial loft vibe. The upholstered bed, soft beige wall color and gold sconce soften the look. Her followers also got a peek inside her bathroom, which features a marble free-standing bathtub.

Fans of Lively couldn’t help but gush over her home’s style and how relatable she is for posting her unmade bed in the comments. 

“I love that your first photo is you looking stunning with an unmade bed,” one user wrote. “Thanks for keeping it real for all of us real peeps.” Others requested a full house tour, especially a closer look at the bathroom.

Lively’s husband of 12 years also shared a roundup of highlights from 2023 on Instagram. Included in the mix of photos was a cute snap of Reynolds with his arm wrapped around his wife. The couple posed together on the beach in front of a rainbow. 

The couple have four children together — daughters James, 9, Inez, 7, Betty, 4, and a fourth baby they welcomed in February.

Reynolds also added a group photo in the post, in which he is seen posing beside his wife and her BFF Taylor Swift at the Chiefs-Jets game at MetLife Stadium in October. Lively and Swift have been friends for almost a decade and are often spotted hanging out together in New York City at restaurants like Emilio’s Ballato in NoLita. 

In December, the actress celebrated her Swift’s 34th birthday alongside pals Gigi Hadid, Jack Antonoff, Sabrina Carpenter, Zoë Kravitz and more.
